articles.title: Chris Gayle becomes co-owner of Glasgow Mugafians in Abhishek Bachchan-backed European T20 cricket league
articles.description: In an exciting turn of events, cricket superstar Chris Gayle has taken a new role as co-owner and global brand ambassador for the Glasgow Mugafians. Set to compete in the inaugural ICC-sanctioned T20 league in Europe, this dynamic franchise is gearing up for the European T20 Premier League, kicking off on August 26, 2026.

articles.title: Babar Azam breaks Virat Kohli, Chris Gayle records after sensational PSL century
articles.description: Babar Azam finally reached a century in the Pakistan Super League 2026. He scored an unbeaten 100 off 52 balls for Peshawar Zalmi against Quetta Gladiators. This century ended a long wait for the star batter. He also became the fastest to 12,000 T20 runs. Peshawar Zalmi won the match by 118 runs.

articles.title: CM Punk makes hilarious gesture after losing heavyweight title to Roman Reigns at WrestleMania 42
articles.description: CM Punk lost the World Heavyweight Championship to Roman Reigns at WrestleMania 42 after a physically demanding main event. Despite the defeat, Punk created a viral moment backstage by wearing a fan’s “CM Punk is Babygirl” shirt and embracing the humor of the situation. The contrast between his intense in-ring persona and this playful gesture added a fresh dimension to his character, giving fans a memorable moment beyond the match itself.

articles.title: Serie A: AC Milan, Juventus close in on Champions League qualification
articles.description: AC Milan beat Verona 1-0 while Juventus defeated Bologna 2-0 as the Italian giants took another step to secure a spot in the UEFA Champions League next season.

articles.title: 'My bat is the prize': Shreyas Iyer reveals dressing-room contest
articles.description: Punjab Kings secured a dominant 54-run victory over Lucknow Super Giants, propelling them to the top of the table. Captain Shreyas Iyer revealed a light-hearted six-hitting contest in the dressing room fueled the team's batting prowess, with Priyansh Arya and Cooper Connolly smashing centuries to post a season-high 254/7.

articles.title: Is Fernando Mendoza single? Expected No. 1 pick in the 2026 NFL Draft makes it clear
articles.description: Fernando Mendoza is set to go No. 1 overall in the 2026 NFL Draft, with the Las Vegas Raiders widely expected to select him. His early involvement in the team’s offensive system suggests strong internal confidence in his role. While draft night approaches, Mendoza remains grounded, opting for a quiet celebration in Florida and maintaining a distraction-free routine. His focus and preparation have positioned him as a franchise-ready quarterback even before his name is officially called.

articles.title: Thunder take Game 1, expect Suns 'to get better'
articles.description: The Oklahoma City Thunder, the NBA's defending champions and the No. 1 seed in the Western Conference, opened their latest postseason run Sunday afternoon with a dominant 119-84 performance at the Paycom Center over the Phoenix Suns.

articles.title: US soccer star Carli Lloyd announces pregnancy at 43 after infertility battle and IVF journey, calls new baby a miracle
articles.description: Carli Lloyd has announced she is pregnant again at 43, expecting her second child in September 2026. The former US soccer star shared emotional photos with her family on Instagram. After facing infertility and multiple IVF rounds earlier, Lloyd called this moment hard to believe. She also spoke about supporting women dealing with similar fertility struggles.

articles.title: Krunal Pandya In India's T20I Team? 5 Players Who Can Make Comeback After IPL 2026
articles.description: IPL 2026 offers India fringe players a comeback chance, with Shreyas Iyer, Mohammed Shami, Krunal Pandya, Prasidh Krishna and Bhuvneshwar Kumar impressing in form

articles.title: Arya–Connolly carnage rewrites IPL history, trail only Kohli–ABD in elite list
articles.description: Punjab Kings' Priyansh Arya and Cooper Connolly etched their names in IPL history with a blistering 182-run partnership off just 80 balls against Lucknow Super Giants. Their explosive display, featuring 16 sixes, now ranks second only to the legendary Kohli-de Villiers stand for scoring rate in IPL history. This remarkable feat highlights Punjab's emerging talent.

articles.title: WWE WrestleMania 42 LIVE: Brock Lesnar Retires After Loss Against Oba Femi
articles.description: WWE WrestleMania 42 Live Updates: Brock Lesnar announced his retirement from WWE following his loss against Oba Femi on Night 2 of WrestleMania 42.

articles.title: NBA Awards: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, Victor Wembanyama, Nikola Jokic named NBA MVP finalists
articles.description: NBA MVP finalists have been announced. Reigning MVP Shai Gilgeous-Alexander is up against rising star Victor Wembanyama and three-time winner Nikola Jokic. Gilgeous-Alexander led his team to the best record. Wembanyama impressed with his two-way play. Jokic achieved a historic triple-double average. Winners will be revealed during the playoffs.

articles.title: Alessandro Delbianco drops to knees in shock after motorbike catches fire during 24 Hours of Le Mans
articles.description: Alessandro Delbianco faced a frightening moment at the 24 Hours of Le Mans when his Yamaha bike suddenly caught fire. He quickly stopped, turned off the engine, and got away safely before dropping to his knees in shock. The incident, likely caused by engine failure, shocked fans, but no injuries were reported, avoiding a major disaster.

articles.title: Erling Haaland ignores Sky Sports warning, refuses apology after scoring winner and reacting to Gabriel Magalhaes clash
articles.description: Erling Haaland scored the winning goal against Arsenal but grabbed headlines for his post-match interview. He refused to apologise after being warned for his language by a Sky Sports reporter. He praised Bernardo Silva, spoke about his clash with Gabriel Magalhaes, and questioned the referee’s decision, keeping focus both on and off the pitch.

articles.title: JEE Mains 2026 Result: Check expected release timeline at jeemain.nta.nic.in and steps to download your scorecard
articles.description: JEE Mains 2026 Season 2 Result link: The National Testing Agency (NTA) is expected to release the JEE Main Session 2 Result 2026 around April 20, 2026. Candidates can check their scorecards on official NTA websites after logging in with their application number and password or date of birth.

articles.title: Bengals get star defensive tackle Lawrence from Giants for 10th overall pick and extend him
articles.description: The Cincinnati Bengals acquired three-time Pro Bowl defensive tackle Dexter Lawrence from the New York Giants for the 10th pick in the upcoming NFL draft.

articles.title: Tiger Woods son Charlie Woods struggles continue with T42 at Terra Cotta Invitational 2026 as Justin Thomas steps in with support
articles.description: Charlie Woods finished T42 at the Terra Cotta Invitational 2026 after improving across three rounds. Despite a strong recovery, his overall performance still showed inconsistency. His 2026 season has been tough, including a last-place finish at the Junior Invitational. Justin Thomas, speaking on the Smylie Show, offered support and praised Woods’ talent during this challenging phase.

articles.title: WATCH: Roman Reigns’ epic entrance honoring 'The Bloodline' during WrestleMania 42 goes viral
articles.description: Roman Reigns has once again proven his dominance by defeating CM Punk for the World Heavyweight Championship at WrestleMania 42. His electrifying entrance paid tribute to The Bloodline, captivating fans worldwide. The championship match was a fierce contest with numerous momentum shifts. Reigns ultimately secured the victory with a series of spears, solidifying his status as 'The Tribal Chief'.
